rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 24, 2015, line 3. PLAINTIFFS JOANNE ANNUZZI and OSVALDO MARTINEZ's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Pursuant To Subpoena transferred to Department 301 for hearing on December 8, 2015 at 9:00 A.M. Parties to provide courtesy copies of their respective papers in support of and in opposition to the motion to Department 301 no later than November 30, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and place. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON A CABRERA ET AL VS. RITA MELNYKAITE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 24, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTS RITA MELNYKAITE, LISA STENSON, COLLEEN BOND, FELICIANO ARANDA, ROBERT MARINO, DOROTHY HUGHES, PATRICIA MONTANO, DONALD PARAMO and LINDA NAIFY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
